items.name: Open Micro Frontend Platform
items.description: The Open Micro Frontend Platform (OpenMFP) aims to provide the opinionated, “batteries-included” platform for building portals and complex web-based applications with enterprise qualities.

items.name: Luigi
items.description: Luigi is a micro frontend framework that enables you to create a unified user experience across a large set of functionality.

items.name: Konfidence
items.description: Konfidence is an open-source software delivery framework. It ensures that only tested and approved versions reach production, addressing a common challenge in complex IT landscapes.
